mapper.select:
SELECT e.emp_id AS empId, e.emp_name AS empName, a.work_date AS workDate, a.check_in_time AS checkInTime, a.check_out_time AS checkOutTime, NULL AS managerId FROM ATTENDANCE a JOIN EMPLOYEE e ON a.emp_id = e.emp_id
AND e.emp_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{empName}, '%')
AND a.work_date = #{workDate}
ORDER BY a.work_date DESC, e.emp_id

SELECT e.emp_id AS empId, e.emp_name AS empName, a.work_date AS workDate, a.check_in_time AS checkInTime, a.check_out_time AS checkOutTime, NULL AS managerId FROM ATTENDANCE a JOIN EMPLOYEE e ON a.emp_id = e.emp_id WHERE e.emp_id = #{empId} AND a.work_date = #{workDate}

SELECT l.emp_id AS empId, e.emp_name AS empName, d.dep_name AS depName, l.leave_id AS leaveId, l.upload_date AS uploadDate, l.leave_start_date AS leaveStartDate, l.leave_end_date AS leaveEndDate, l.leave_status AS leaveStatus, l.leave_days AS leaveDays, l.approval_confirmed AS approvalConfirmed, f.file_name AS fileName, f.file_path AS filePath, f.file_size AS fileSize, f.file_type AS fileType FROM LEAVE l JOIN EMPLOYEE e ON l.emp_id = e.emp_id JOIN DEPARTMENT d ON e.dep_id = d.dep_id LEFT JOIN FILE f ON l.leave_id = f.leave_id WHERE (#{empId} IS NULL OR l.emp_id = #{empId}) AND (#{empName} IS NULL OR e.emp_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{empName}, '%')) ORDER BY l.upload_date DESC
